title: Conjunctivitis (starter evidence summary)
text:
STARTER EVIDENCE SUMMARY (placeholder)
- Phone-only triage: identify contact lens use, severe pain/photophobia, vision change, periorbital swelling/fever.
- Contact lens wearers + pain/photophobia/vision change -> urgent same-day in-person evaluation.
- Severe pain, vision loss, or swelling around the eye with fever -> urgent care/ER.
- Replace this stub with real guideline snippets via the manifest fetcher.
